issues.title: Tripwire boolean leaks cross-capability/cross-area
issues.resolution: Per-tuple {capability, area_id} JSONB GUC; triggers verify exact tuple against protected row's area + required cap map.

issues.title: v1→v2 cutover lacks rollout choreography
issues.resolution: Split into 0142a additive + 0142b enforcement; CI gate checks fleet /version before 0142b.

issues.title: SECURITY DEFINER hardening missing
issues.resolution: Owner metaldocs_admin, SET search_path, REVOKE FROM PUBLIC, GRANT writer only, strict arg regex validation.

issues.title: Scheduler bypass GUC may leak across pooled conns
issues.resolution: SET LOCAL only inside tx; session-level forbidden; Probe I asserts absence outside scheduler path.

issues.title: Cancel state change not mapped to a migration
issues.resolution: New Migration 0144 sequenced before Task 6.6; instance + stage CHECK + transition trigger.

issues.title: Route immutability needs DB enforcement
issues.resolution: Migration 0145 trigger on route_configs UPDATE/DELETE + service-level FOR UPDATE serialization.

action_taken: All 6 fixes applied inline. Upgrade_required satisfied via structural splits (0142a/b, new 0144, 0145). Round 2 skipped.
